subject: POTUS
body:
Jeffrey

Trump is due to arrive PBI Friday 6pm and depart Sunday 8:30pm
Times may change, I'll keep you posted.
Teterboro is an arrival gateway to PBI when TFR is in effect, NO airMarshal is needed, just 24hour advance Passenger list and Prescreening at departure airport.

Thx
Larry

Sent from my iPhone
